investigation_summary.question: Why does replay/backtest produce signals_total=0 in paper reference windows, despite paper containing ORDER+FILL?
investigation_summary.classification_detail: Three independently verifiable gaps combine to produce the observed behavior

gaps.description: Pre-window SIGNAL events are not exported by the paper reference window runner
artifact_evidence: artifacts/calibration/2961/pilot_baseline/paper_reference_window.json (0 SIGNAL events, has ORDER+FILL with signal_id)

gaps.description: Live signal service uses tick price (intra-candle), replay uses candle close price
Comparison reports signal_count_delta=0 (false neutral), masking real signal absence
code_files: core/replay/replay_vs_paper_compare.py:186-200 (paper signal_count counted from SIGNAL events in window)

investigation_summary.mixed_cause_rationale: Pilot window primarily explained by PAPER_REFERENCE_EXPORT_GAP (SIGNAL before window start, not exported). #3028 window primarily confounded by venue_mismatch but would still show LIVE_VS_REPLAY_SIGNAL_SEMANTICS_GAP. METRIC_COUNTING_GAP masks the pilot gap from downstream consumers.

paper_events.note: occurred before 00:42:00, not exported by paper reference runner

pilot_window.note: signal_count_delta=0 is a FALSE NEUTRAL. Paper SIGNAL existed but outside window bounds. Replay produced 0 signals.

window_3028.note: SIGNAL IS inside window bounds. Delta=-1 is visible. However, confounded by venue/regime. Live uses tick prices, replay uses candle closes.

follow_up.implementation_issue_title: [ARVP][SIGNAL][FIX] Preserve causal signal context for paper reference replay comparison
follow_up.implementation_scope: Fix paper_reference_window_export.py to include causally-linked pre-window SIGNAL events
follow_up.implementation_validation: After fix, pilot window signal_count_delta should change from 0 to -1
follow_up.architectural_gap_tracking: LIVE_VS_REPLAY_SIGNAL_SEMANTICS_GAP — document as known limitation, no narrow fix available

safety_boundaries: No runtime execution beyond committed artifacts
This investigation is diagnosis, not trading authorization
restunsicherheiten: Exact pre-window SIGNAL timestamp for pilot not preserved in committed artifacts
No same-venue MEXC data for #3028 to isolate LIVE_VS_REPLAY_SIGNAL_SEMANTICS_GAP
